name: STORM
description: An Omega-level Mutant ability to manipulate weather patterns makes Ororo Munroe a force to be reckoned with. Rain or shine, thunder or lightning, nature itself bends to the command of the Goddess of the Storm!
lore: Born a Mutant and worshipped as a Goddess due to her ability to manipulate the weather, Ororo Munroe became the X-Man known as Storm. As the regent of Sol and the protector of Arakko, she now serves as a protector for Mutants on Earth and beyond. The chronal energy generated by the Timestream Entanglement has resulted in violent temporal tempests on the sentient island Krakoa, the nation that the X-Men call home. Although her powers are capable of stabilizing the island's climate, Storm seeks a more permanent solution alongside her fellow heroes.

stats.Casting: Projectile that fires in a straight trajectory
stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 15m, decreasing to 60% at 30m

abilities.name: Omega Hurricane
abilities.description: Transform into a hurricane to draw in nearby enemies and deal damage

stats.Special Effect: Weather effects will be disabled during the Ultimate

abilities.name: Weather Control
abilities.description: Switch the weather to empower allies: Tornado grants a Movement Boost; Thunder grants a Damage Boost

stats.Special Effect: Under this aura, Wind Blade hits reduce Bolt Rush cooldown by 0.5s (only once per cast, even if hitting multiple enemies). Increase Bolt Rush spell field range radius from 1m to 1.5m

abilities.name: Goddess Boost
abilities.description: Channel the power of the weather to empower Storm: Tornado grants a Movement Boost and inflicts Slow on enemies; Thunder grants a Damage Boost and summons lightning to inflict damage

stats.Range: A cylindrical spell field with a radius of 1m and a height of 40m

received.name: ETERNAL WEATHER WITCH
received.description: Storm channels her elemental power into Adam Warlock. When Adam uses Soaring Surge, his movement speed is increased. While flying, Adam leaves behind a storm-charged trail that heals and speeds up allies within it

base.description: Upgrade Wind Blade into a hitscan beam that detonates upon striking a target.

stats.Damage Falloff: Falloff begins at 20m, decreasing to 75% at 40m

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Thor, Bolt Rush becomes Chain Lightning, allowing it to bounce from foe to foe

base.description: Unleash a torrential downpour that continuously heals both herself and her teammates.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Jeff the Land Shark, casting Omega Hurricane allows Jeff to swim inside the cyclone, generating a localized Jeff-nado.
